common.tagline: AI-crafted songs for your little one

hero.title: Music made for your baby, powered by AI
hero.subtitle: Lullabies, educational songs, and fun tunes — crafted with artificial intelligence and designed for little ears.

categories.title: Songs for every moment
categories.lullabiesDesc: Gentle melodies to help your baby drift off to sleep
categories.educationalDesc: Learn colors, numbers, animals, and more through music
categories.funDesc: Upbeat songs for playtime and happy moments

platforms.title: Listen anywhere
platforms.subtitle: Find BabyBeats on your favorite music platform

pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready

create.title: Create a song for your baby
create.childHint: This name will appear in the lyrics of the song
create.customPlaceholder: e.g., include animals, mention bedtime, about counting to 10...
create.previewHint: Review the lyrics, then generate the audio
create.needCredits: You need credits to generate audio

generating.title: Creating your song...
generating.patience: This usually takes 1-3 minutes. You can leave this page and check "My Songs" later.
generating.created: Your personalized song has been created
generating.failedHint: The audio generation failed. Your credit has not been charged.

platforms.title: Listen on your favorite platform
platforms.subtitle: Download the MP3 and add it to Spotify or Apple Music to listen alongside your music

spotify.title: Add to Spotify
spotify.step2: Open Spotify on your computer (desktop app)
spotify.step3: Go to Settings → Local Files → Turn on
spotify.step4: Add the folder where you saved the MP3
spotify.step5: The song appears in "Local Files" — add it to any playlist
spotify.step6: On your phone, download the playlist on WiFi to listen offline

apple.title: Add to Apple Music
apple.step2: Open the Music app (or iTunes) on your computer
apple.step3: Drag the MP3 into your library
apple.step4: The song syncs automatically to all your devices via iCloud
apple.step5: Add it to any playlist alongside your music
